title: BEM-654 telegram repair smoke
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
triggers=Path('governance/triggers'); triggers.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

smoke=scripts/'telegram_send_smoke.py'
smoke.write_text(sep.join([
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import http.client',
'import json',
'import os',
'import urllib.parse',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'OUT = Path("governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json")',
'REPORT = Path("governance/reports/telegram_send_smoke_result.md")',
'MESSAGE = "BEM-654 | TELEGRAM DELIVERY SMOKE | workflow_runtime\\n\\nПроверка доставки Telegram из GitHub Actions. Если это сообщение получено, bot/chat secrets and sendMessage path work."',
'def truth(value):',
'    return bool(str(value or "").strip())',
'def main():',
'    token = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN", "")',
'    chat_id = os.environ.get("TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID", "")',
'    result = {"schema_version":"telegram_send_smoke.v1","status":"not_run","has_bot_token":truth(token),"has_chat_id":truth(chat_id),"http_status":None,"telegram_ok":False,"delivery_confirmed":False,"blocker":None}',
'    if not truth(token) or not truth(chat_id):',
'        result["status"] = "missing_secret"',
'        result["blocker"] = {"code":"TELEGRAM_SECRET_MISSING","has_bot_token":truth(token),"has_chat_id":truth(chat_id)}',
'    else:',
'        payload = urllib.parse.urlencode({"chat_id": chat_id, "text": MESSAGE, "disable_web_page_preview":"true"})',
'        headers = {"content-type":"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"}',
'        try:',
'            conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.telegram.org", timeout=30)',
'            conn.request("POST", "/bot" + token + "/sendMessage", body=payload, headers=headers)',
'            resp = conn.getresponse()',
'            raw = resp.read().decode("utf-8", errors="ignore")',
'            result["http_status"] = resp.status',
'            try:',
'                data = json.loads(raw)',
'            except:',
'                data = {"raw_preview": raw[:500]}',
'            result["telegram_ok"] = bool(isinstance(data, dict) and data.get("ok") is True)',
'            result["telegram_response_preview"] = {"ok": data.get("ok") if isinstance(data, dict) else None, "description": data.get("description") if isinstance(data, dict) else None}',
'            if resp.status == 200 and result["telegram_ok"]:',
'                result["status"] = "sent"',
'                result["delivery_confirmed"] = True',
'                result["blocker"] = None',
'            else:',
'                result["status"] = "http_or_api_failed"',
'                result["blocker"] = {"code":"TELEGRAM_SEND_FAILED","http_status":resp.status,"telegram_response_preview":result["telegram_response_preview"]}',
'        except:',
'            result["status"] = "runtime_error"',
'            result["blocker"] = {"code":"TELEGRAM_SEND_RUNTIME_ERROR"}',
'    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    OUT.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    REPORT.write_text("# BEM-654 | Telegram Send Smoke Result" + SEP + SEP + "Status: " + result["status"] + SEP + "Delivery confirmed: " + str(result["delivery_confirmed"]) + SEP + "HTTP status: " + str(result.get("http_status")) + SEP + "Blocker: " + ("null" if result.get("blocker") is None else json.dumps(result.get("blocker"), ensure_ascii=False)) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps({"status": result["status"], "delivery_confirmed": result["delivery_confirmed"]}, ensure_ascii=False))',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    main()'
])+sep)

wf=wfs/'telegram-send-smoke.yml'
wf.write_text('''name: Telegram Send Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/triggers/telegram_send_smoke.trigger'
      - 'scripts/telegram_send_smoke.py'
      - '.github/workflows/telegram-send-smoke.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: telegram-send-smoke
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  telegram-send-smoke:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check telegram smoke
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Run telegram send smoke
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
          TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID }}
        run: python3 scripts/telegram_send_smoke.py

      - name: Commit telegram smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/telegram_send_smoke_result.json governance/reports/telegram_send_smoke_result.md
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-654 telegram send smoke result"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')

# Re-trigger both smoke and canonical hourly report.
(triggers/'telegram_send_smoke.trigger').write_text('BEM-654 trigger telegram send smoke 2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'+sep)
(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger').write_text('BEM-654 retrigger curator hourly report 2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'+sep)

protocol=protocols/'TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_REPAIR_PROTOCOL.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-654 | Telegram Delivery Repair Protocol'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Goal'+sep+'Prove whether Telegram non-delivery is caused by missing secrets, Bot API failure, workflow failure, or curator-hourly-report rendering/sending path.'+sep+sep+'## Steps'+sep+'1. Direct Telegram send smoke through GitHub Actions secrets.'+sep+'2. Re-trigger curator-hourly-report after smoke.'+sep+'3. Verify `telegram_send_smoke_result.delivery_confirmed` and `curator_hourly_delivery_verification.delivery_confirmed`.'+sep+'4. Hourly report readiness cannot be PASS until delivery proof is true.'+sep)

state={'schema_version':'telegram_delivery_repair_smoke.v1','bem':'BEM-654','status':'smoke_workflow_created_and_triggered','smoke_script':str(smoke),'smoke_workflow':str(wf),'triggers':['governance/triggers/telegram_send_smoke.trigger','governance/triggers/curator_hourly_report.trigger'],'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem654_telegram_delivery_repair_smoke.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem654_telegram_delivery_repair_smoke.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-654 | Telegram Delivery Repair Smoke | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Created direct Telegram send smoke workflow and re-triggered curator hourly report. Awaiting workflow result state.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem654_telegram_delivery_repair_smoke','cycle_id':'bem654-telegram-delivery-repair-smoke','source':'executor','status':'smoke_workflow_created_and_triggered','state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem654_telegram_delivery_repair_smoke']={'status':'smoke_workflow_created_and_triggered','state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':None}
contour_state['telegram_delivery_repair_status']='smoke_triggered'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:45 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem654_telegram_delivery_repair_smoke.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-654 PASS: Telegram send smoke workflow created and triggered; curator hourly report retriggered.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(smoke),str(wf),str(triggers/'telegram_send_smoke.trigger'),str(triggers/'curator_hourly_report.trigger'),str(protocol),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created direct Telegram send smoke workflow, retriggered curator hourly report, and recorded repair protocol')
"""
No issue comments.
